'''Abanol''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the second orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beshqek]] of the [[Beshqek system]], within the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a toxic rock orbited by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and neighbor to the mythical world of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="BDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abanol was introduced in the ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'', a [[Wizards of the Coast]] supplement for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published in [[2005]].<ref name="BDC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square K-11.<ref name="TEA" />
